definitions.text: To form (something) by combining materials or parts.
To develop or give form to (something) according to a plan or process.
To increase or strengthen (something) by adding gradually to.
The physique of a human or animal body, or other object; constitution or structure.
examples: Rugby players are of sturdy build.

definitions.text: Any of various versions of a software product as it is being developed for release to users.
examples: The computer company has introduced a new prototype build to beta testers.
